meta.description: A single function in a pipeline's ordered execution sequence.

functionId.description: UUID of the Function item to execute.

outputTypeId.description: UUID of the type definition this step is expected to produce.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_f5d047d0_d2e6_4d4d_8c62_2586d19d48be" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "function_id" UUID,
    "output_type_id" UUID,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_f5d047d0_d2e6_4d4d_8c62_2586d19d48be" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_f5d047d0d2e64d4d_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_f5d047d0d2e64d4d_function_id" FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_f5d047d0d2e64d4d_output_type_id" FOREIGN KEY ("output_type_id") REFERENCES items(id)
)
